title: Self-Adhesive Glitter Stones, Sparkling Gem Rhinestones in Various Shapes, 3D Crystal Stickers, Children's Craft Supplies, DIY Creations
features: A variety of shapes: The set includes over two thousand decorative stickers of various shapes, such as circles, squares, hearts, and flowers. These self-adhesive decorative stones are available in different sizes to meet your decoration needs for all kinds of handicraft projects and unlock endless creative possibilities for you.

Convenient to use: These shiny acrylic decorative stickers have a smooth surface and a charming luster. The crystal pearl stickers can be easily torn off and stuck onto handicrafts and projects without leaving any marks when removed.

Wide range of uses: The large gems are perfect for doing handicraft projects with children. These decorative stickers are ideal for decorating cups, laptops, photo frames, diaries, mobile phones, and handmade gifts. They can also be used for beauty decoration on faces, hair, nails, eyes, earrings, etc. They are very suitable as festival decorations for Christmas, Halloween, birthday parties, and other festivals.
Vivid and colorful: These high-quality acrylic shiny gems present all the colors of the rainbow. They can perfectly reflect light and add a charming luster to decorations, handicrafts, and jewelry.
Creative gifts: With these gems, you can make a truly unique birthday gift, Christmas gift, or commemorative gift for friends, family, partners, or close friends.
description: Product description Large gemstone stickers are ideal for DIY decorations and card design. With these craft stickers, you can embellish various items such as treasure chests, costumes, greeting cards, and much more. They are also perfect for decorating your birthday parties, anniversaries, Halloween, Christmas, and other occasions, making them suitable for a variety of scenarios. With these glittery stickers, you can enjoy the creative fun of crafting together with your children. Safety Warning Avoid exposing children under the age of three to it, as it may cause them to ingest it by mistake.
